hero.title: Get Paying Customers with AI
hero.subtitle: AI Sales Intelligence System — find high-intent leads and convert them into sales. Built for sales teams and agencies.

problem_solution.title: Manual prospecting is slow. AI automates customer discovery.

problem.title: The Problem
problem.desc: Sales teams spend 40% of their time manually researching prospects, finding contact info, and writing outreach messages.

solution.title: Our Solution
solution.desc: AI discovers high-intent B2B leads, scores them by buying probability, and generates personalized multi-channel outreach — in seconds.

scoring.title: AI Lead Scoring (0-100)
scoring.desc: Dual-layer scoring system evaluates each lead's buying probability with 92% accuracy.

outreach.title: Multi-Channel Outreach
outreach.desc: Personalized messages for Email, LinkedIn, and Instagram — auto-selected by best channel.

discovery.title: Real-Time Customer Discovery
discovery.desc: Enter industry + location, get verified high-intent leads with contact info and revenue potential.

step1.title: Define Your Market
step1.desc: Enter your target industry, keyword, and location

step2.title: AI Discovers Leads
step2.desc: Our dual-layer AI validates and scores each prospect

step3.title: Convert to Sales
step3.desc: Get ready-to-send outreach messages optimized for each channel

bottom_cta.title: Ready to find your next customers?
bottom_cta.subtitle: Join sales professionals using AI to discover and convert high-value leads.

pricing.title: Start Closing More Deals Today
pricing.subtitle: Choose your plan. Upgrade anytime as you grow.

dashboard.empty: Enter your target market above and click "Discover Leads" to find high-intent prospects.

section1.title: AI-Powered Discovery
section1.desc: Our system uses advanced language models to discover real B2B companies matching your target criteria — not scraped databases or purchased lists.

section2.title: Quality Validation
section2.desc: Every lead passes through a dual-layer validation system. Layer 1 generates prospects. Layer 2 independently verifies quality and adjusts scores. Low-quality leads are automatically rejected.

section3.title: Scoring Methodology
section3.desc: Leads are scored 0-100 based on: industry relevance, company signals, market timing, and buying intent indicators. Final score is a weighted average of initial AI assessment plus validation adjustment.
